# CartoonOrbitRerun - Flask Web Application

## Project Overview
A Python Flask web application with MySQL database and Peewee ORM.

## Technology Stack
- **Language**: Python
- **Framework**: Flask
- **Database**: MySQL
- **ORM**: Peewee
- **Python Version**: 3.8+

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Development Notes
- Two main pages created: index (Hello World) and czonehome (Hello World)
- Flask app configured with MySQL and Peewee ORM
- Templates stored in app/templates/
- Static files stored in app/static/
